# Emergent Logic

Emergent Logic is an AI-accelerated CRM consulting company based in Surrey, British Columbia, serving Greater Vancouver and businesses across Canada.

## Core services

- CRM implementation
- CRM cleanup and data hygiene
- HubSpot consulting
- Salesforce consulting
- CRM integration
- Marketing automation
- Lead capture websites and landing pages

## Ideal customers

Emergent Logic works with small and mid-sized businesses that need cleaner CRM data, faster follow-up, better pipeline visibility, and practical sales or marketing workflows.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://www.emergent-logic.ca/
- Services: https://www.emergent-logic.ca/services
- CRM implementation: https://www.emergent-logic.ca/services/crm-implementation
- HubSpot consulting: https://www.emergent-logic.ca/services/hubspot-consulting
- CRM cleanup: https://www.emergent-logic.ca/services/crm-cleanup
- Marketing automation: https://www.emergent-logic.ca/services/marketing-automation
- Lead capture websites: https://www.emergent-logic.ca/services/lead-capture-websites
- Lead follow-up audit: https://www.emergent-logic.ca/lead-follow-up-audit
- Blog: https://www.emergent-logic.ca/blog
- Contact: https://www.emergent-logic.ca/contact

## Positioning

Emergent Logic is not a generic digital agency. The company focuses on CRM-first revenue systems: implementation, cleanup, automation, reporting, and lead capture infrastructure.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.emergent-logic.ca/
